name: Aevra
description: Chrome extension wallet for Avalanche eERC confidential assets (Fuji testnet)

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://api.avax-test.network https://api.avax.network https://*.avax-test.network https://*.avax.network https://api.routescan.io https://api.coingecko.com;
